ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the city was founded */,
  "mayor_name" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capital city of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the state was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "white_population" INTEGER /* Number of white residents */,
  "black_population" INTEGER /* Number of black residents */,
  "native_american_population" INTEGER /* Number of Native American residents */,
  "asian_population" INTEGER /* Number of Asian residents */,
  "hispanic_population" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic residents */,
  "other_population" INTEGER /* Number of residents belonging to other racial categories */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of residents in the labor force */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed residents */,
  "male_computer_engineering" INTEGER /* Number of male residents employed in computer engineering */,
  "female_computer_engineering" INTEGER /* Number of female residents employed in computer engineering */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the labor force that is employed */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the labor force that is unemployed */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of employed residents */,
  "employment_by_industry" TEXT /* JSON object with employment counts by industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_demographics" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of residents */,
  "median_male_age" REAL /* Median age of male residents */,
  "median_female_age" REAL /* Median age of female residents */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object with age distribution data */,
  "median_age_children" REAL /* Median age of children */,
  "median_age_elderly" REAL /* Median age of elderly people */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "income_per_capita" REAL /* Income per capita */,
  "median_gross_rent" REAL /* Median gross rent */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  "rental_vacancy_rate" REAL /* Percentage of rental properties that are vacant */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Percentage of households that own their homes */,
  "average_home_size" REAL /* Average size of homes in square feet */,
  "average_rental_size" REAL /* Average size of rental properties in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the quality of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_data_sources" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "source_id")
)
